description: Dataset split and data quality diagnostic
validation_method: Repeated file-based holdout plus cross-quadrant holdout
main_observation: Diagnostic experiment focused on split instability, weak files, quadrant effects, and cross-quadrant generalization

description: Realtime temporal decision simulation with sliding-window predictions
main_observation: Best temporal strategy: majority_vote_5. Current dataset has very short file sequences, so this is mainly an architecture simulation before Dataset v2.

description: Scenario-based realtime stream simulation with state-machine strategies
validation_method: Artificial scenario streams assembled from file-based holdout test groups
main_observation: Best scenario strategy: raw_prediction. This is an architecture simulation, not final validation.

description: Confidence-aware realtime temporal decision simulation
validation_method: Artificial scenario streams assembled from file-based holdout test groups
main_observation: Best realtime-score strategy: majority_vote_3. Realtime score=0.604674. This favors accuracy while penalizing false transitions and delay.

description: Candidate model structure export for embedded feasibility
validation_method: Model structure analysis, not performance validation
main_observation: Multiclass model contains 60 trees, 898 nodes and about 179.97 comparisons per window.

description: Professor suggestions: Logistic Regression, XGBoost and probability-based multiclass metrics
main_observation: Models compared by repeated holdout using F1, ROC-AUC, Average Precision and aggregated confusion matrices

description: Feature-budget comparison for compact Gradient Boosting and XGBoost candidates
main_observation: Highest mean Macro F1 is recorded in the index. Final embedded selection must also consider movement F1, nodes, used features and the compact recommendation table.
